name: Tortellini in Balsamic Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 package refrigerated tricolor cheese-filled tortellini (9 ounces)
1/4 cup balsamic vinegar or cider vinegar
1 tablespoon fresh basil, chopped, or 1 teaspoon dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare vinaigrette, mix all vinaigrette ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Cook and drain tortellini as directed on package. Rinse with cold water, then drain.
3. Stir carrot, broccoli, and onions into vinaigrette. Add tortellini, toss to coat evenly.
